title: Warm Sun Where the Wind Blows

text_block_list.text: On my day off, I was on my way to the department store…

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Why, this is a coincidence, Trainer. 
What are ya up to?
choice_data_list: I was thinking of buying a new suit.

text_block_list.text:
We were doing a lot more meetings with the public lately, 
so I wanted to freshen up my wardrobe a bit.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
A new suit, hmm… I can see the benefit in buying one. 
Never a bad thing to have more proper-looking clothes on hand.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
……… 
Say… Would ya mind if I helped pick out your new suit?
choice_data_list: Oh, are you good with this kind of thing?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I wouldn't go that far… But if it's a question of finding 
something that fits ya, Trainer, I think I might be able to help.
choice_data_list: Thanks! Looks like I'm counting on you.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: Hmm………

In the store, I pulled a suit off the rack and held in front of my 
chest, waiting for Lucky Lilac's opinion.
choice_data_list: S-So, what do you think…?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
The silhouette ain't bad… But I think we can find something 
more your color. Could ya hang tight for a minute? I'll go look.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
(You're a real hard worker, Trainer. 
Stepping out of your comfort zone and trying to be a better 
fool, just for my sake…)

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
(This is a good chance to return the favor. 
I'll pick out the best suit in the place. Let's see, which one 
would fit Trainer's personality the best…)

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
(It's standard to just go with grey or black… But that ain't 
quite right. Trainer's well put together, but there's also 
that bit of a playful side…)

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
(Hmm, maybe a splash of beige'll bring out his bright side…!? 
Let's see, I'll take this, and this… We can try out this necktie, 
too.)

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
(Hmm, maybe a splash of beige'll bring out her bright side…!? 
Let's see, I'll take this, and this… We can try out this blouse, 
too.)

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
I asked the clerk for permission, so would ya kindly try on that 
here jacket?
choice_data_list: Oh, yeah, of course.
Oh, yeah, of course.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Hmm… Hmm… Oh, hang on. 
Would ya mind turning to your side for a second?
choice_data_list: Huh? Something wrong?
Huh? Something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: Heehee. I knew it. If you'll excuse me…

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: You've got a wrinkle in your collar… So I'll just…

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
There, that's much better. 
I suppose we should see how you look with everything on.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Hmm… Mmhmm! I'd say you're looking sharp. 
What do ya think, Trainer?
choice_data_list: It feels kind of fancy… Cool!
It feels kind of fancy… Cool!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Mmhmm. The outfit's well put together, and it's got a sprinkle 
of your unique charm. I think ya look great.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Oh, do ya want to put on a pin for your tie? 
I saw some fancy-looking ones on display in that place we passed.
choice_data_list: We're already out shopping, so sure!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Oh, do ya want to put on a broach, too? 
I saw some fancy-looking ones on display in that place we passed.
choice_data_list: We're already out shopping, so sure!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Heehee, then let's go, shall we? 
They had a whole bunch in stock, so there'll be plenty to 
try out.

Even in this new store, Lucky Lilac continued to carefully 
examine every option. She was even more dependable than 
ever, taking the lead while still considering my opinion.

Thinking about how much she was doing for my sake 
made me want to return the favor with a bit of fun——

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
What do ya think of something like this here pin? 
It's a bit on the conservative side, but it's still quite lovely——
choice_data_list: Yeah… It'll go perfect with your hair!
I don't know, I'm scared of bugs…

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
What do ya think of something like this here broach? 
It's a bit on the conservative side, but it's still quite lovely——
choice_data_list: Yeah… It'll go perfect with your hair!
I don't know, I'm scared of bugs…

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: What?
choice_data_list: Uh… 'This ain't no hairpin!' …Haha?
Uh… 'Broach, not roach!' …Haha?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: ……Huh?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
…Haha, clever with the jokes as always, aren't ya? 
Come on, let's go take a look at something else.

Her reaction felt completely different from normal. 
……I guess that joke was every bit as forced as I thought.

After that, the two of us continued shopping around, and 
eventually finished putting my new outfit together. 
When we stopped at a nearby cafe to take a break——

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
What'll ya be having, Trainer? 
These pancakes seem quite appetizing.
choice_data_list: Gimme a fluffy one wit extra cream, boss!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: ………Haha. Just be careful not to eat too much, hear?

She really was acting differently after all. 
Like she was trying to force herself to ignore my jokes… 
Was I really that unfunny?
choice_data_list: I'm sorry. That wasn't funny.
I'm sorry. That wasn't funny.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Huh? …Oh, no, no. 
That's not the problem, it's…………

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Er… Trainer. 
Ya know ya don't have to force yourself to joke around, right?
choice_data_list: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: I'm veeeery well aware that ya want to do everything ya can to help my running… But ya realize it's our day off.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: Whether or not ya joke today has nothing to do with training.
choice_data_list: (……Oh, man, now that I think about it!)

text_block_list.text:
It was exactly as she said. If all I wanted to do was improve 
her running, I had no reason to keep joking around on my 
days off.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
……See? No need to push yourself so far. 
Ya don't have to worry so much about me. Just enjoy yourself.
choice_data_list: (Just enjoy myself…)

text_block_list.text:
I started playing the fool to help her run. That much was true. 
And admittedly, I wasn't used to joking around, so I was prone 
to overthinking it. But——

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
……Haha… Ahahaha! …Well… I accept. Now then… 
I still have a lot to learn… But I'm honored to work with ya, 
if you'll have me.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: …Er, Trainer?
choice_data_list: I'm not forcing myself.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: ……Hmm?

When I saw her, I saw the face of a cool and composed 
young lady. But when that expression loosened, and 
that composure thawed out… I felt…
choice_data_list: <size=30>If you're enjoying yourself, then I'm happy.</size>
<size=30>If you're enjoying yourself, then I'm happy.</size>

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: Wh——
choice_data_list: Yeah. I just… I want to make you laugh.
Yeah. I just… I want to make you laugh.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: ……Wait, then was that also——

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
…"It'll go perfect with your hair! That ain't no hairpin!" 
If I remember correctly.
choice_data_list: That was the best I could do…

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
……"I don't know, I'm scared of bugs… Broach, not roach!" 
If I remember correctly.
choice_data_list: That was the best I could do…

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: ……………Pff. Now I understand.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
——I suppose getting a joke to land is a lot 
harder than ya might think.
choice_data_list: It sure is. But I'll keep trying to improve!
It sure is. But I'll keep trying to improve!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
……You will? 
Well, I'm certainly looking forward to it.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
This roasted tea chiffon cake looks delicious. 
I live for this sort of sickly-sweet cake.
choice_data_list: What would go with it… Curry, maybe?
What would go with it… Curry, maybe?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
choice_data_list: ……Just joking.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: …………… …Oh, good grief.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: What da heck! Haha.
